and the stronger the upside positive charm (same logic but suppressive flows) becomes,
the harder for the momentum to escape

comment.body:
you take the strikes of the yellow line and the green line, and calculates their geometric mean.
it will ROUGHLY estimate the mean of the growth scale of the speed profile and give you a hint about a potential "event horizont" line, from where the momentum could be attracted to one or the other lines...
green or yellow...
